title: Tender Kenyan Butter Stir-fry
description: A low-carb-friendly solo-dinner dish featuring tender meat or tofu, infused with the rich flavors of tahini paste and fermented vegetables.
instructions: Preheat your oven to 180°C (350°F). Season the chicken with salt and pepper.
Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat. Add the chicken, cooking until browned on all sides.
Add tahini paste and fermented vegetables to the skillet. Stir well until the mixture thickens and coats the chicken evenly.
Reduce heat to low and let the dish simmer for about 5 minutes, allowing flavors to meld together.
Transfer the stir-fry into a serving plate. Drizzle with remaining oil if needed and serve hot.
